news.title: Nexalin Technology Announces Two Clinical Abstracts Accepted for Presentation at the 2026 NYC Neuromodulation Conference Highlighting Preliminary Clinical Results Across Anxiety, Depression, Insomnia and Quality of Life
Nexalin Study Shows Strong Anxiety and Depression Response in Brazil Trial

Nexalin Technology Reports Compelling Clinical Trial Results in Brazil to Support Product Launch. Trial Demonstrates 77.8% Anxiety Response Rate and Durable Benefits Across Depression, Insomnia and Quality of Life as Company Advances Brazilian Sales Plan.
EXCLUSIVE: Nexalin Brazil Trial Shows Benefits Across Anxiety, Sleep And Quality Of Life
